creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
> ports/lang/dylan/files/d2c.gz.uu is a huge file and should not be part
> of the ports distribution - it should be a distfile.  Currently
> everyone is forced to receive it.  It's 2.4 meg.  This could
> cause a meltdown of CTM.

Oh well, that was the cause of the 26 100KB CTM mails I received :(

It cost me some $2 (metered local phone call, not *that* much, but 
if you multiply by the number recipients that have to pay the same 
amount it will become a relevant number ...) and now I'm considering 
to unsubscribe from the CTM mail list before that file is removed 
again (which I'm afraid will cause another delta of the same size).

Please somebody try to get rid of this file in such a way that it 
will not cause another flood of useless mail!

STefan
